display.label: fields
display.description: Field names in the record whose values are to be copied or moved to headers.

display.label: headers
display.description: Header names, in the same order as the field names listed in the fields configuration property.

display.label: operation
display.description: Either move if the fields are to be moved to the headers (removed from the key/value), or copy if the fields are to be copied to the headers (retained in the key/value).

display.label: replace.null.with.default
display.description: Whether to replace fields that have a default value and that are null to the default value. When set to true, the Default: true
